deprecated: ⚠️ Text commands (like `!search`) are being discontinued soon, because Discord is removing the bot's access to message text. Please switch to the new slash commands — type `/` and pick one (e.g. `/search`, `/alt`, `/commands`, `/help`).
commandsPrompt: Click the button to view the custom commands list.
profilePrompt: Click the button to view your stats.
blocked: This feature is not available for you.
termsPrompt: 📜 Please review and accept our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy before using the bot.
termsExplain:
📜 **Terms of Service & Privacy Policy**

Katyusha is a card-search bot. It only reads messages that start with the command prefix — to identify the command and its arguments; all other messages are ignored. It does not archive conversations, and stored data is limited to what is required to run your commands.

By accepting, you allow the Bot administrators to access your avatar, username, and commands. Your input is also used to improve search functionality. We may restrict your usage of the bot without your consent and without any explanation.

Click **Accept** to agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy and use the bot. Click **Decline** and you will not be able to use the bot until you accept.{{links}}
termsAccepted: ✅ Thank you! You have accepted the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy. You can now use the bot.
termsDeclined: You have declined the Terms of Service. You cannot use the bot until you accept. Type `!terms` any time to review and accept.
prisonerLimitWarning: Prisoner role is limited to {{limit}} commands per day. Your command limit resets {{reset}}.
dailyCommandLimitReached: Daily command limit reached ({{limit}}). Your limit resets {{reset}}.
dailyDeckScreenshotLimitReached: Daily deck screenshot limit reached ({{limit}}). Your limit resets {{reset}}.
help:
Katyusha Kards Bot commands


/search - search for cards, type your query right after the command.

The bot recognizes all keywords of the game such as BLITZ, GUARD, etc. All not recognized words are used for searching in title and text.

3k - Deployment cost
2c or 2op - Operation cost
5-5 or 5/5 - Five attack and five defense
Use * as a placeholder for any attack or defense: */4 - all units with 4 defense. 0/* - all units with zero attack.

Nations for search: SOVIET GERMANY BRITAIN USA JAPAN POLAND FRANCE ITALY FINLAND ANZAC

/search soviet infantry guard 1/8 3k 1c - the only card matching all the keywords.

/alt - alternate art gallery
/deck - screenshot of a deck from a link or import code
/commands - list all custom commands (add text to filter, e.g. /commands a)
/profile - your bot stats and settings (change your search language here)
/online - Steam players online and stats
/utc - current UTC time
/midnight - relative time to 00:00 UTC+0 (daily reset)
/ranking - Top Deck ranking
/myrank - your personal Top Deck ranking with stats
/contact - contact the bot administrators
/terms - review and accept the Terms of Service & Privacy Policy
/help - this message
contactPrompt: Click the button below to send a message to bot administrators.
contactModalInputPlaceholder: Please describe your issue or request...
contactSuccess: Your message has been sent to the bot administrators.
contactFailDeliver: Could not deliver the message. Please try opening an issue on GitHub.
contactFailAdmins: Could not find any administrators to contact.
cacheForwardNotice: Search request from {{name}}: {{query}}. Forwarding cached message.
